sections.paragraph: only in plur. לוּלָאֹות, def. לֻלָאֹות, constr. לֻלְאֹות (of the form דּוּדָאִים which see), loops, into which the hooks (קְרָסִים) were put in the curtains of the holy tabernacle; Schleifen, Schlingen, so called from their being twisted round, Exo 26:4, seq.; 36:11 , seq.; Vulg. ansulœ.
